title: GitHub User Guide
summary: Ministry of Justice standards and best practices for using GitHub. Learn how to effectively manage repositories, collaborate with teams, and follow our GitHub governance standards.

sections.title: Getting Started
sections.description: Essential information for new users — setting up your account, authentication, and basic repository access.

sections.title: Best Practices
sections.description: Recommended workflows, branching strategies, code review standards, and collaboration patterns.

sections.title: Governance & Security
sections.description: Organisation standards, access control, security standards, and audit requirements.

items.title: GitHub Terms of Service
items.description: Terms of Service for acceptable use of GitHub by Ministry of Justice teams.

items.title: Setting up GitHub
items.description: Getting your GitHub account configured and accessing Ministry of Justice repositories.

items.title: Branching Strategy
items.description: How we structure branches and manage feature development across MoJ projects.

items.title: Code Review Standards
items.description: Pull request process, review expectations, and approval workflows.
